Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.rupture
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.rupture
Trapped-liquid fire rupture screening for blocked-in process piping segments.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.rupture used by neqsim.process.safety.rupture
    Class
    Description
    FireExposureScenario
    Fire exposure definition for trapped-liquid rupture screening.
    FireExposureScenario.FireType
    Fire exposure calculation method.
    MaterialStrengthCurve
    Temperature-dependent material strength curve for fire rupture screening.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult
    Result from a trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder
    Builder used by the study implementation.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.FailureMode
    Limiting outcome for the study.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy
    Transient trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study for blocked-in piping segments.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder
    Builder for TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.
